name: Breezy HR Recruiting API
what_it_does: Breezy HR REST API for applicant tracking and recruiting platform. Enables AI agents to query job positions, retrieve candidate applications, access pipeline stages, and integrate recruiting data into HR workflows. Breezy HR is popular with SMB and mid-market companies for its modern UI and collaborative hiring features.
use_cases: Querying job position status and candidate pipeline from talent analytics agents
Retrieving candidate application data and interview feedback from HR workflow agents
Managing job postings and pipeline stages from recruiting automation agents
Integrating Breezy recruiting data into HRIS and reporting agents
not_for: Enterprise talent acquisition at scale (Breezy is SMB/mid-market focused)
Mass automated candidate outreach without recruiter oversight
best_when: An SMB or mid-market company using Breezy HR wants AI agents to surface pipeline data, track candidate progress, and integrate recruiting metrics into HR reporting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Candidate data including applications and interview feedback is sensitive. Automated screening requires EEOC compliance. Breezy is less enterprise-grade than iCIMS or SmartRecruiters.

auth.notes: Breezy HR access token authentication. Tokens obtained via username/password sign-in API. Session-based tokens with expiry.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Bootstrap plan: free forever for 1 active position
pricing.notes: SMB/mid-market ATS with free tier. Good value for small recruiting teams.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Candidate application data and interview feedback is sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Auth uses username/password to get session token — design for token refresh
SOC2 only (not ISO27001) — may be insufficient for some enterprise compliance requirements
Rate limits undocumented — throttle for bulk candidate queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Candidate PII and hiring data. SOC2. Session token auth via username/password. EEOC considerations for screening.

security_score_components.security_notes: Candidate hiring data. SOC2 only. Session-based auth from username/password.
